alkylation reagent: Iodoacetamide was then added to 20 mM
alkylation concentration: iodoacetamide was then added to 20 mM
cleavage agent: digested at room temperature for 13 h with Lys-C protease
collision energy: fragmentation by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD, normalized collision energy 32%)
fragmentation method: fragmentation by higher energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: Mass spectrometric data were collected on an Exploris480 mass spectrometer
labeling: quantitative proteomics using isobaric labeling with tandem mass tags (TMT)
reduction reagent: incubation with 5 mM fresh DTT for 1 h
reduction concentration: incubation with 5 mM fresh DTT for 1 h
